channel.title: GitHub PHP Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
item.description: Firefly III: a personal finances manager

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: bagisto/bagisto
item.description: Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

item.title: shopware/shopware
item.description: Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 1.500 community extensions

item.title: matomo-org/matomo
item.description: Empowering People Ethically with the leading open source alternative to Google Analytics that gives you full control over your data. Matomo lets you easily collect data from websites & apps and visualise this data and extract insights. Privacy is built-in. Liberating Web Analytics. Star us on Github? +1. And we love Pull Requests!

item.title: monicahq/monica
item.description: Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: alextselegidis/easyappointments
item.description: 📅 Easy!Appointments - Self Hosted Appointment Scheduler

item.title: laravel/laravel
item.description: Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax. We’ve already laid the foundation for your next big idea — freeing you to create without sweating the small things.

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: danielmiessler/SecLists
item.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

item.title: leokhoa/laragon
item.description: Laragon is a portable, isolated, fast & powerful universal development environment for PHP, Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. It is fast, lightweight, easy-to-use and easy-to-extend.

item.title: vitodeploy/vito
item.description: The Ultimate Server Management Tool

item.title: glpi-project/glpi
item.description: GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

item.title: alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
item.description: Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

item.title: rectorphp/rector
item.description: Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code

item.title: magento/magento2
item.description: Prior to making any Submission(s), you must sign an Adobe Contributor License Agreement, available here at: https://opensource.adobe.com/cla.html. All Submissions you make to Adobe Inc. and its affiliates, assigns and subsidiaries (collectively “Adobe”) are subject to the terms of the Adobe Contributor License Agreement.

item.title: espocrm/espocrm
item.description: EspoCRM – Open Source CRM Application

item.title: woocommerce/woocommerce
item.description: A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.

item.title: snipe/snipe-it
item.description: A free open source IT asset/license management system

item.title: elementor/elementor
item.description: The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

item.title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
item.description: A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

item.title: DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg
item.description: ⚡ Dynamically generated, customizable SVG that gives the appearance of typing and deleting text for use on your profile page, repositories, or website.

item.title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
item.description: 🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README
